title: Rahatgarh Heat Wave
lead: Rahatgarh is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.37. The city's temperature has reached critically high levels, scoring 10.0/10 on the heat wave index.
body:
The current heat wave in Rahatgarh has led to extremely high temperatures, resulting in a critical level of heat stress. 
 The relative humidity is at 26%, and the wind speed is 11.1 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 14.3 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, showing no need for heating.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
